meaning: n.纪念物,纪念馆,纪念议事,请愿书adj.记念的,记忆的
examples: The town raised a memorial to those killed in the war.
Building a memorial to Columbus has been his lifelong dream.
The painting will be a lasting memorial to a remarkable woman.
The memorial started with a candle-lit procession, then Governor Tim Pawlenty gave the opening remarks.
Plans to sanction the digs and turn the site into a memorial have not gotten very far.
